installCommand: curl -sSL https://dot.net/v1/dotnet-install.sh | bash /dev/stdin --channel 8.0 && export PATH="$HOME/.dotnet:$PATH" && dotnet restore QuotelyAPP/QuotelyAPP/QuotelyAPP.csproj
buildCommand: export PATH="$HOME/.dotnet:$PATH" && dotnet publish QuotelyAPP/QuotelyAPP/QuotelyAPP.csproj -c Release -o output && rm -rf deploy && mkdir -p deploy/api && cp -r output/wwwroot/. deploy/ && cp -r api/. deploy/api/
